children.heading: .—Application
children.label: a .—Application
children.text: This section applies only to aircraft not used to provide air transportation.
$12 for issuing an airman’s certificate to a pilot.
$25 for registering an aircraft after the transfer of ownership.
$7.50 for processing a form for a major repair or alteration of a fuel tank or fuel system of an aircraft.

children.heading: .—Adjustments
children.label: c .—Adjustments
children.text: The Administrator shall adjust the maximum fees established by subsection (b) of this section for changes in the Consumer Price Index of All Urban Consumers published by the Secretary of Labor.

children.heading: .—Credit to Account and Availability
children.label: d .—Credit to Account and Availability
children.text: Money collected from fees imposed under this section shall be credited to the account in the Treasury from which the Administrator incurs expenses in carrying out chapter 441 and sections 44701–44716 of this title (except sections 44701(c), 44703(g)(2), and 44713(d)(2)). The money is available to the Administrator to pay expenses for which the fees are collected.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: A fee may not be imposed under this section before the date on which the regulations prescribed under sections 44111(d), 44703(g)(2), and 44713(d)(2) of this title take effect.

children.heading: .—Effect of imposition of other fees
children.label: 2 .—Effect of imposition of other fees
children.text: A fee may not be imposed for a service or activity under this section during any period in which a fee for the same service or activity is imposed under section 45305.
